message:
fix(beads): correct dependency structure for UX features

- Convert epic blocking deps to relates-to (features can work in parallel)
- Add test beads for Phase 2 features (ewe, b09, gn0, xoh, 1hk)
- Add test bead for verbose mode (gs3)
- Remove duplicate dependencies

This fixes the issue where features were incorrectly blocked by their
parent epics, preventing parallel work on independent features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
